summary: Backend engineer focused on building clean, reliable distributed systems with Java and Spring Boot. Experienced in setting up event-driven architectures using Apache Kafka and resolving complex concurrency and performance bottlenecks with Redis. I also enjoy bridging the gap between traditional backend systems and modern AI, having built intelligent pipelines using LLMs and vector databases like pgvector. • Languages: Java (Primary), C, SQL • Core Competencies: Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA), Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Distributed Systems • Frameworks: Spring Boot, Microservices Architecture, REST APIs • Databases & Tools: PostgreSQL, Redis, Apache Kafka, Docker, Git, GitHub, pgvector
